# 🎮 Gaming (55)

Games are AI's favorite proving ground — and now the agents that learned to play are building the worlds too. Spawn smarter NPCs, generate infinite levels, and bolt intelligence straight into your engine.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## Game AI

Reinforcement-learning agents and behavior systems that make NPCs actually think

<details>
<summary>Show 16 repos</summary>

- [Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios](https://github.com/Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios) — ⭐ 17,431 · `Shell` · AI Agent — Claude-Code-Game-Studios transforms Claude Code into a comprehensive game development studio by leveraging 49 AI agents and 72 workflow skills. It employs a sophisticated coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchies to assist in game creation.
- [official-stockfish/Stockfish](https://github.com/official-stockfish/Stockfish) — ⭐ 15,532 · `C++` · Application — A free and strong UCI chess engine that analyzes chess positions via NNUE neural networks, providing powerful game analysis.
- [Coding-Solo/godot-mcp](https://github.com/Coding-Solo/godot-mcp) — ⭐ 3,561 · `JavaScript` · MCP Server — An MCP (Multi-Agent Communication Protocol) server designed to interface with the Godot game engine, offering tools to launch the editor, run projects, and capture debug output, enabling AI agents to interact with and manage Godot development.
- [IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP](https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP) — ⭐ 2,982 · `C#` · MCP Server — This repository provides AI skills, tools, and a CLI for the Unity Engine, enabling a full AI development and testing loop for game projects. It integrates with various LLM platforms like Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, and Cursor, allowing C# methods to be easily turned into AI tools.
- [levy-street/world-of-claudecraft](https://github.com/levy-street/world-of-claudecraft) — ⭐ 753 · `TypeScript` · Application — This repository hosts the code for "World of Claudecraft," a web-based game. Its name suggests potential integration or inspiration from AI, possibly leveraging large language models like Claude within the game mechanics.
- [pipecat-ai/gradient-bang](https://github.com/pipecat-ai/gradient-bang) — ⭐ 367 · `TypeScript` · Application — Gradient Bang is an online multiplayer universe enabling players to explore, trade, battle, and collaborate with others and with LLMs, featuring interactive voice agents for enhanced engagement.
- [sethkarten/pokechamp](https://github.com/sethkarten/pokechamp) — ⭐ 158 · `Python` · AI Agent — PokeChamp is an expert-level minimax language agent designed for competitive Pokémon, described in an ICML 2025 spotlight paper.
- [NousResearch/pokemon-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/pokemon-agent) — ⭐ 88 · `Python` · AI Agent — This repository provides an AI-powered agent designed to play Pokémon games. It leverages headless emulation, offers a REST API, and includes a live dashboard for monitoring, working with any large language model.
- [andyhuo520/tang-changan](https://github.com/andyhuo520/tang-changan) — ⭐ 69 · `JavaScript` · Application — A web-based 3D interactive game that recreates the Tang Dynasty city of Chang'an, allowing users to explore the environment and engage in real-time AI voice conversations with historical figures like Li Bai.
- [KilledByAPixel/LittleJS-AI](https://github.com/KilledByAPixel/LittleJS-AI) — ⭐ 37 · `HTML` · Library — This repository features AI-powered games, tools, and experiments built with the LittleJS game engine. It aims to accelerate game development by integrating AI capabilities, specifically utilizing Claude for faster creation.
- [asallay/godot-llm](https://github.com/asallay/godot-llm) — ⭐ 33 · `GDScript` · Application — This experimental Godot project demonstrates running Gemma 4 LLM inference entirely within the Godot game engine using GDScript and Vulkan compute shaders. It explores the integration of advanced AI models directly into game development environments.
- [JeanKaddour/sokoban\_speedrun](https://github.com/JeanKaddour/sokoban_speedrun) — ⭐ 29 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains Reinforcement Learning (RL) models developed to play the puzzle game Sokoban, with the goal of finding the fastest possible solutions. It focuses on applying RL techniques to solve and optimize gameplay strategies for Sokoban.
- [teknium1/hermes-miniverse](https://github.com/teknium1/hermes-miniverse) — ⭐ 23 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This project serves as a bridge, connecting the Hermes Agent to Miniverse pixel worlds, likely enabling AI agents to interact within simulated environments.
- [mxlin043/OmniGameArena](https://github.com/mxlin043/OmniGameArena) — ⭐ 18 · `Python` · Paper Code — OmniGameArena is a research project providing a diverse collection of game environments, accessible via a browser, designed for training and evaluating AI agents.
- [CSSLab/maia3](https://github.com/CSSLab/maia3) — ⭐ 13 · `Python` · Library — Maia-3 is a human chess move prediction engine that aims to predict what players from various skill levels would actually play, rather than just the optimal engine move. It offers state-of-the-art accuracy and efficiency.
- [tensor2023/OpenPixel-RPG](https://github.com/tensor2023/OpenPixel-RPG) — ⭐ 13 · `TypeScript` · Application — This AI-powered JRPG generates interactive pixel-art game worlds from user-provided photos or addresses, creating local NPCs and narratives based on a chosen style. It leverages AI, including Gemini, for world design, map generation, and dynamic NPC behavior, offering users a unique, customizable game experience.

</details>

## Procedural Generation

Generators that conjure endless levels, maps, and assets from a single seed

- [louis-e/arnis](https://github.com/louis-e/arnis) — ⭐ 15,505 · `Rust` · Application — A tool that generates detailed Minecraft worlds for Java and Bedrock editions, based on real-world locations and data from sources like OpenStreetMap.
- [htdt/godogen](https://github.com/htdt/godogen) — ⭐ 3,259 · `Python` · AI Agent — This project facilitates autonomous game development for Godot and Bevy game engines by leveraging Claude Code and Codex for generation and assistance.
- [0x0funky/agent-sprite-forge](https://github.com/0x0funky/agent-sprite-forge) — ⭐ 2,260 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository contains an agent skill for generating 2D sprite sheets, maps, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts. It's primarily used for creating pixel art and game assets.
- [AHEKOT/ComfyUI\_VNCCS](https://github.com/AHEKOT/ComfyUI_VNCCS) — ⭐ 1,161 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This is a ComfyUI plugin designed to create consistent character sprites for visual novels. It addresses the challenge of maintaining a character's uniform appearance across various images, including different emotions and clothing, when using neural networks.
- [LayrKits/Sprite-Pipeline](https://github.com/LayrKits/Sprite-Pipeline) — ⭐ 443 · `Python` · Library — This repository offers a pipeline specifically designed for the creation of 2D sprite sheets, commonly used in game development and animation.
- [jasonkneen/tiny-world-builder](https://github.com/jasonkneen/tiny-world-builder) — ⭐ 313 · `HTML` · Application — Tiny World Builder is a work-in-progress web application for building voxel-based worlds, featuring a new UI, weather/time controls, rendering optimizations, and upcoming AI integration for map generation.
- [sudoingX/octopus-invaders](https://github.com/sudoingX/octopus-invaders) — ⭐ 66 · `JavaScript` · Application — This repository contains a pixel art space shooter game, notable for being entirely generated by a 9B AI model without human-written code, showcasing AI's capabilities in game development.
- [chongdashu/ai-game-spritesheets](https://github.com/chongdashu/ai-game-spritesheets) — ⭐ 33 · Framework — This project provides a complete pipeline with prompt templates and reference images for generating consistent game character spritesheets and walk cycles using AI, including image-to-video generation for animations.
- [acatovic/ai-game-studio](https://github.com/acatovic/ai-game-studio) — ⭐ 16 · `TypeScript` · Application — An application for AI generation of 2D game assets, specifically focusing on spritesheets, to assist game developers in creating content.

## Game Engines

AI-native engines and frameworks for building intelligent gameplay from the ground up

<details>
<summary>Show 14 repos</summary>

- [raysan5/raylib](https://github.com/raysan5/raylib) — ⭐ 32,781 · `C` · Library — Raylib is a straightforward and user-friendly library for programming video games, designed to make game development enjoyable. It includes a software renderer, expanding its compatibility to platforms like microcontrollers.
- [CoplayDev/unity-mcp](https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp) — ⭐ 10,654 · `C#` · MCP Server — Unity MCP is a Model Context Protocol server that bridges AI assistants with the Unity Editor. It enables large language models (LLMs) to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate various development tasks within Unity projects.
- [HailToDodongo/pyrite64](https://github.com/HailToDodongo/pyrite64) — ⭐ 3,015 · `C++` · Library — Pyrite64 is a game engine and visual editor for developing 3D games on the Nintendo 64 console. It uses libraries like libdragon and tiny3d for N64 game creation.
- [CoderGamester/mcp-unity](https://github.com/CoderGamester/mcp-unity) — ⭐ 1,643 · `C#` · Plugin/Extension — This Unity Editor plugin implements the Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing AI agents from IDEs like Cursor or Claude Code to interact with and control the Unity Editor. It facilitates AI-driven game development and creative workflows.
- [theNetworkChuck/docker-mcp-tutorial](https://github.com/theNetworkChuck/docker-mcp-tutorial) — ⭐ 1,510 · Tutorial/Course — This repository provides comprehensive tutorial materials for building and deploying Minecraft Protocol (MCP) servers using Docker, based on a video by NetworkChuck.
- [drhelius/Gearboy](https://github.com/drhelius/Gearboy) — ⭐ 1,148 · `C++` · MCP Server — Gearboy is a cross-platform emulator for Game Boy, Game Boy Color, and Super Game Boy, featuring a debugger and an embedded MCP server. It allows users to play Game Boy games on various operating systems.
- [MrDrElliot/LuminaEngine](https://github.com/MrDrElliot/LuminaEngine) — ⭐ 434 · `C++` · Framework — LuminaEngine is an advanced open-source C++ game engine. It features multi-threaded Vulkan rendering and mesh fracturing capabilities, designed for developing immersive game projects.
- [Voxybuns/at-icons](https://github.com/Voxybuns/at-icons) — ⭐ 208 · `HTML` · Plugin/Extension — This is an open-source icon pack consisting of 400 SVG icons, designed for custom nodes within the Godot game engine to provide a consistent visual style.
- [yucchiy/UniCli](https://github.com/yucchiy/UniCli) — ⭐ 203 · `C#` · CLI Tool — UniCli is a cross-platform command-line interface tool designed to automate operations within the Unity Editor. It enables both human users and AI agents to execute compilations, run tests, and perform various editor commands, facilitating integration into CI/CD pipelines and AI agent workflows for Unity project automation.
- [0x0funky/agent-game-forge](https://github.com/0x0funky/agent-game-forge) — ⭐ 73 · `TypeScript` · Application — Agent Game Forge (AGF) is a local-first 2D game IDE that integrates AI agents, specifically driven by LLMs like Codex or Claude Code, to facilitate game development.
- [shixiangxi0/Cobweb](https://github.com/shixiangxi0/Cobweb) — ⭐ 57 · `JavaScript` · Framework — An AI-native, logic-driven, event-driven game engine built in JavaScript. It replaces the traditional game loop with an event-driven architecture, making the game process recordable, traceable, and ideal for AI understanding and generation.
- [mirno-ehf/ue5-mcp](https://github.com/mirno-ehf/ue5-mcp) — ⭐ 45 · `C++` · MCP Server — This is an Unreal Engine 5 plugin that enables AI agents, specifically through Claude Code, to edit Blueprints by understanding natural language descriptions.
- [ibrews/ECABridge](https://github.com/ibrews/ECABridge) — ⭐ 28 · `C++` · Plugin/Extension — ECABridge is an AI-powered plugin for Unreal Engine 5 that enhances character customization, scene building, and automation. It's optimized for efficient tool loading by AI agents, particularly for large context window models.
- [agnt-gg/gba-pokemon-rom-to-wasm](https://github.com/agnt-gg/gba-pokemon-rom-to-wasm) — ⭐ 20 · `TypeScript` · Application — This project is a browser-based runtime for Game Boy Advance Pokémon Ruby/Sapphire ROMs. It provides ARM7TDMI machine-code execution, BIOS HLE, GBA hardware modeling, and save game support, all within a WebAssembly-ready browser host for user-supplied ROMs.

</details>

## Modding

Tools that inject AI behavior, dialogue, and content into the games you already love

- [Agustinm28/Optiscaler-Client](https://github.com/Agustinm28/Optiscaler-Client) — ⭐ 830 · `C#` · Application — This is a client application designed to manage OptiScaler, a tool often used to enhance game performance. It automates the installation process of OptiScaler across popular gaming platforms such as Steam, Epic Games, and GOG.
- [zhouxiyu1997/friendmaker](https://github.com/zhouxiyu1997/friendmaker) — ⭐ 259 · `TypeScript` · Application — Friend Maker is a macOS/Windows toolkit that converts images into pixel grids and ESP32 controller scripts for automatic drawing in Nintendo Switch games like Tomodachi Life.

## Other

Simulation sandboxes, bot frameworks, and playful experiments worth a look

<details>
<summary>Show 14 repos</summary>

- [Vita3K/Vita3K](https://github.com/Vita3K/Vita3K) — ⭐ 5,276 · `C++` · Application — An experimental emulator for the PlayStation Vita, allowing users to play PS Vita games on various desktop and mobile operating systems. It aims to replicate the PS Vita hardware and software environment for gameplay.
- [joypad-ai/joypad-os](https://github.com/joypad-ai/joypad-os) — ⭐ 1,392 · `C` · Framework — A universal firmware core for microcontrollers, designed to build custom game controllers and adapters compatible with various gaming platforms.
- [Manoj-engineer/k8squest](https://github.com/Manoj-engineer/k8squest) — ⭐ 1,349 · `Shell` · Application — K8sQuest is a local, hands-on Kubernetes learning game. It presents real-world troubleshooting challenges where users fix broken Kubernetes components like pods, deployments, and services using kubectl on a local cluster.
- [inssekt/CocoonFE](https://github.com/inssekt/CocoonFE) — ⭐ 867 · `Python` · Application — This repository contains an emulation frontend, inspired by the Nintendo 3DS, designed specifically for Android devices.
- [boona13/mykonos-island-voxels](https://github.com/boona13/mykonos-island-voxels) — ⭐ 818 · `JavaScript` · Application — This is a browser-based isometric island builder game, allowing users to create a Mediterranean village by placing voxel blocks on a grid. It is built with vanilla JavaScript for mobile-friendly use.
- [PhantomBot/PhantomBot](https://github.com/PhantomBot/PhantomBot) — ⭐ 814 · `JavaScript` · Self-hosted Service — PhantomBot is an open-source, interactive Twitch bot designed for entertainment and moderation within live streaming channels. It helps streamers manage chat and engage viewers, enabling them to focus on their game and audience.
- [FlightGear/flightgear](https://github.com/FlightGear/flightgear) — ⭐ 695 · `C++` · Application — FlightGear is an open-source flight simulator that offers advanced features like spaceflight capabilities and complex weather modeling, providing a realistic simulation experience.
- [Kilted-Kraken/-RohanKar-Launcher](https://github.com/Kilted-Kraken/-RohanKar-Launcher) — ⭐ 507 · `JavaScript` · Application — RohanKar Launcher is an application designed to browse and install classic PC games, primarily fetching them from Archive.org.
- [Manic-EMU/ManicEMU](https://github.com/Manic-EMU/ManicEMU) — ⭐ 331 · `C` · Application — Manic EMU is a comprehensive retro game emulator specifically designed for iOS, enabling users to play classic titles from systems like Nintendo 3DS, N64, and PSP with a smooth gameplay experience and iCloud synchronization.
- [stagas/hallucinate](https://github.com/stagas/hallucinate) — ⭐ 183 · `TypeScript` · Application — This repository implements a massively multiplayer online rave experience, offering an interactive digital environment for multiple users simultaneously.
- [Redherring32/OpenTendo-AGB](https://github.com/Redherring32/OpenTendo-AGB) — ⭐ 128 · Library — This project is an open-source, 1:1 recreation of the Game Boy Advance motherboard. It aims to replicate the original hardware design for archival and development purposes.
- [starlightk7/OpenSFC](https://github.com/starlightk7/OpenSFC) — ⭐ 89 · Library — This project provides open-source hardware reproduction parts necessary for rebuilding or repairing the Super Famicom/Super Nintendo game console. It offers resources for enthusiasts and hobbyists interested in retro gaming hardware.
- [duolahypercho/gta-vi-caliber](https://github.com/duolahypercho/gta-vi-caliber) — ⭐ 47 · `GDScript` · Application — This is a community-driven, open-source project to build an open-world game, aiming for AAA-trailer quality using the Godot 4 engine and custom C++ modules. It's a fun initiative to create a game similar to GTA 6.
- [ImGoodBai/MapGoGoGo](https://github.com/ImGoodBai/MapGoGoGo) — ⭐ 25 · `TypeScript` · Application — This is a web application prototype where users walk to 'light up' or 'unlock' parts of a map, offering a location-based challenge similar to a game. It features a React/Vite frontend and a Python/FastAPI/SQLite backend, integrating with map APIs like Gaode Maps.

</details>
